changedFiles.reason: Added verified idempotent remote branch deletion that accepts a platform-completed deletion only after the remote ref is confirmed absent.
Added race, still-existing-branch, and unverifiable-state regression coverage.
Documented the idempotent remote deletion postcondition and retained fail-closed behavior.

Raised tracked-file and archive Contract/Summary limits from 720/260/260 to the measured final baseline of 721/264/264 so the repository evidence, including this archived Work Item, passes its own complexity check.
Created and then removed the transient design record after implementation; it is not part of the final repository change.
Created and then removed the transient implementation plan after execution; it is not part of the final repository change.
Declared scope, intent, acceptance, scenarios, risks, and verification for the maintenance Work Item.
Generated status for the active Work Item.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Remote branch is deleted by the platform before explicit deletion
Remote deletion fails while the branch still exists
Normal remote deletion and existing closure ordering

guidelinesCompliance.guideline: New public APIs must be documented.
guidelinesCompliance.evidence: No public API was added; the private helper has a docstring and lifecycle behavior is documented.

guidelinesCompliance.guideline: Do not import internal modules from other features.
guidelinesCompliance.evidence: The change uses existing imports and adds no cross-feature imports.

risk.detail: Remote deletion is concurrent with provider-side cleanup; acceptance is intentionally based only on the authoritative final remote-ref check.

observedIssues.detail: The repository contains 264 Contract/Summary archive pairs after this Work Item is archived; the existing complexity limits were updated to the final measured baseline with explicit user approval.

residualRisks.detail: Provider-specific delete error text is intentionally ignored; a successful final ls-remote absence check is the sole acceptance criterion after a delete request failure.
The complexity policy now records the final tracked-file and archive evidence baseline; future archive growth will require a separate reviewed threshold update.

reviewReadiness.reason: All required verification passed; residual risk remains documented.
expectedReviewFocus: Confirm that only a verified absent remote branch makes a failed delete request successful.
Confirm that the pre-existing local ignored archive complexity failure is not hidden or fixed in this Work Item.

intentAlignment.rationaleValidated: The delete request is now non-fatal, while fetch --prune plus ls-remote remains authoritative; unrelated Makefile, installer, template, and threshold changes were excluded.

boundaryChecks.runtimeEntrypoints: verified: ai-close-work-item continues to use the existing script entrypoint
boundaryChecks.userVisibleOutput: verified: closed output remains gated by final postcondition checks
boundaryChecks.generatedArtifacts: verified: current_status.md is generated by Make target

userCorrectionsCaptured: User approved a separate idempotency maintenance fix and explicitly requested that it not be mixed with the key upgrade.
User explicitly approved updating the existing archive complexity thresholds so this Work Item can complete.
userCorrectionSolidification: The scope excludes unrelated lifecycle, Makefile, installer, template, and governance logic changes; only the existing tracked-file and archive Contract/Summary limits are updated to the measured final baseline.

checkpointEvidence.detail: make ai-checkpoint CONTRACT=.ai/work-items/active/work_item_close_idempotency.contract.json SUMMARY=.ai/work-items/active/work_item_close_idempotency.summary.json STAGE=before_edit passed before production edits.
ai-finish executed the before_finish checkpoint and recorded passed scope, acceptance, scenario, and verification context after the approved threshold update.

knownGaps: A live GitHub auto-delete race was observed by the user but not reproduced against a live remote; the deterministic fake-runner regression test models the exact state transition.
overclaimPrevention: Do not report local governance complexity as passed; it remains a pre-existing ignored-archive baseline issue.
